markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new content OS and align on the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content OS Delivered:** A 60+ topic content OS is live in Airtable, balancing high-volume keywords (for general traffic) with low-volume, high-intent keywords (for qualified leads).](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** The team will focus on foundational content for the 8-week sprint. "Harder" keywords and niche topics will be parked for a future quarterly strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Airtable Tagging:** To streamline review, GrowthX will tag topics as "foundational" or "extension." Read AI will then prioritize the "extension" list, which represents the team's strategic reach goals.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [**Voice & Tone Draft:** GrowthX will deliver a draft article by Monday to establish the desired voice and tone, enabling parallel work on the Airtable tagging.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)

## Topics

### Content OS & Strategy Review

  - [GrowthX presented the new Content OS in Airtable, featuring 60+ blog ideas clustered by topic.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [**David's Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**"Straightforward Targets":** The current topics feel too obvious.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
      - [**"Sales Guidance":** More content is needed on sales teams and the "automated workflow with agents for sales AGI."](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Rationale:** The 8-week sprint prioritizes foundational content to build organic traffic quickly. "Harder" topics are a quarterly strategy, not an immediate focus.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
      - [**Primary Goal:** Balance high-volume, high-difficulty keywords (e.g., "AI agents," 27k searches/mo) with low-volume, high-intent keywords (e.g., "AI workplace automation agents," 10 searches/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Why:** Low-volume keywords, while niche, have a higher audience overlap and are easier to rank for, driving qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [**Data Context:** SEMrush data is a conservative estimate. Actual traffic will be higher because articles rank for many related keywords, and AI-related search volume is growing faster than historical data reflects.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)

### AI Search Optimization (AEO)

  - [**Goal:** Appear in AI chatbot answers (e.g., ChatGPT) for direct user queries.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**Method:** AEO is achieved via content structure, not keyword difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Format:** Skimmable, chunked paragraphs with one idea per sentence.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [**Elements:** TLDRs and FAQs that AI models can easily pull for answers.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** AEO performance is uncorrelated with Google rank. A page 4 article can be a top AI answer if it's structured well.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [**Actionable Framework:** Evaluate topics by asking, "Could this article help a user answer a question they'd pose to ChatGPT?"](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)

### Airtable Review Process Refinement

  - [**Problem:** The team needs a clearer way to prioritize topics beyond a simple thumbs-up/down.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will tag topics in Airtable to create a two-tiered system for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
      - [**Foundational:** Core topics for the 8-week sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
      - [**Extension:** Strategic reach goals for future consideration.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
  - [**Workflow:** Read AI will review the "extension" list to debate and stack-rank strategic priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
      - [Deliver a draft article by Monday for voice and tone alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
      - [Tag Airtable topics as "foundational" or "extension" before Monday's meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)
  - [**Read AI:**](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
      - [Review the draft article and provide feedback by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
      - [Reschedule the next sync to Monday, Nov 24.](https://fathom.video/share/Miy5R2sJXtUTFRmh_mxdppdM6S9zmxpi?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
